unit.name: Pilfer
unit.gameplay_identity: Assassin calibration unit carrying Catalyst, Cartel through one decisive combat silhouette.
unit.supernatural_cost: each theft chemically mismatches skin, fur, voice, and limb temperature

psychology.core_wound: Every group that sheltered them assigned a profitable identity and punished any behavior that contradicted it.
psychology.private_want: They want acceptance that does not require becoming a fixed, useful version of themselves.
psychology.primary_fear: Someone will define them permanently, predict them, and make adaptation impossible.
psychology.survival_strategy: They become whatever the room rewards before anyone can decide what they are.
psychology.villainous_distortion: They steal identities, chemistry, and trust from others, leaving victims less coherent so Pilfer can remain unpinned.
psychology.current_emotional_state: Ingratiating vigilance at the instant before opportunistic theft.
psychology.emotional_contradiction: A quick plea to be liked versus active readiness to steal the viewer's valued trait.
psychology.face_direction: One eye scans for reward while the exposed adult cheek, mouth, and jaw form an adaptive please-like-me smile over visible tension.
psychology.pose_direction: The dash-loaded wedge bows deferentially while the long siphon hand has already crossed into the viewer's space.
psychology.forbidden_read: No juvenile, cute rat, generic ninja, faceless scarf assassin, cackling thief, or harmless scavenger.

visible_face_evidence.feeling: Current feeling is visible as Ingratiating vigilance at the instant before opportunistic theft.
visible_face_evidence.want: The visible intent supports this private want: They want acceptance that does not require becoming a fixed, useful version of themselves.
visible_face_evidence.fear_or_concealment: The face visibly guards against this fear: Someone will define them permanently, predict them, and make adaptation impossible.
visible_face_evidence.active_survival_strategy: Face and posture enact this survival strategy: They become whatever the room rewards before anyone can decide what they are.
visible_face_evidence.villainous_read: The visible behavior expresses this distortion: They steal identities, chemistry, and trust from others, leaving victims less coherent so Pilfer can remain unpinned.

Pose cue: The dash-loaded wedge bows deferentially while the long siphon hand has already crossed into the viewer's space.

professional_standard.benchmark_comparison: The immutable Round 6 evidence compares pilfer directly with approved matte Vellum and all eleven calibration peers at master, face, and exact-96 scales.

critical_dimensions.evidence: Board-observed evidence for pilfer: A mature opportunistic ratfolk assassin reads dangerous, adaptive, and intentionally non-cute.
critical_dimensions.benchmark_comparison: Against the approved hard-matte Vellum anchor and the full role-grouped roster boards, pilfer meets or exceeds the professional floor for audience_and_intent_fit.

critical_dimensions.evidence: Board-observed evidence for pilfer: Fur, scarred skin, cloth, salts, and translucent fingers have controlled tactile distinction.
critical_dimensions.benchmark_comparison: Against the approved hard-matte Vellum anchor and the full role-grouped roster boards, pilfer meets or exceeds the professional floor for craft_and_finish.

critical_dimensions.evidence: Board-observed evidence for pilfer: The forward siphon hand and dash-loaded body create one uninterrupted theft vector.
critical_dimensions.benchmark_comparison: Against the approved hard-matte Vellum anchor and the full role-grouped roster boards, pilfer meets or exceeds the professional floor for coherence_and_hierarchy.

professional_standard.rejection_case: The strongest honest rejection case was tested against the native evidence, derivative lineage, anatomy, trait channels, and roster comparisons and did not survive cross-examination.
professional_standard.excellence_gap: Later production may further refine micro-material transitions, but no gap falls below the professional concept-art floor or weakens the locked identity.

cross_examination.outcome: All decisive claims survived the one permitted cross-examination; no unrefuted blocker remains.
